hero.name: DIEGO GOMEZ
hero.tagline: Building the future, one prompt at a time.

arcade.pitch: One last stop before you go: every world hides its own minigame.

teyvat.name: Spark hunt
teyvat.hint: Catch the golden sparks before they fade away. 30 seconds.

gym.name: Rep rush
gym.hint: Smash the plates before they drop. 30 seconds. No mercy.

cyber.name: PROTOCOL: BREACH
cyber.hint: Intercept the nodes before the trace shuts them down. 30 seconds.

kob.desc: Jewelry e-commerce platform with catalog and admin dashboard.

barberia.desc: Angular frontend for booking and managing a barbershop.

aimo.desc: AI conversational assistant for emotional support of university students.
aimo.note: Initial support — not a substitute for professional help.
aimo.bubbleUser: Hey, today was a rough day…
aimo.bubbleBot: I'm here to listen. Want to tell me more?

airpiano.desc: Air piano: play notes by moving your fingers in front of the webcam.

rein.desc: Local Jarvis-style voice assistant for Windows 11, in Spanish.
rein.noUi: No web UI — it lives on your PC

contact.pitch: Shall we build something together? Reach out or check my code.
